arts.ttl: OGC Nice captain Dante ruled out of PSG encounter
arts.sum: OGC Nice captain Dante (41) has been ruled out of OGC Nice’s meeting against Paris Saint-Germain on Friday night with a knee issue, AFP understands. Dante also missed last Sunday’s match against…

PSG's 10-game winning run ended in midweek as they were held to a 1-1 draw with Nantes. Even so, the French side remain unbeaten in Ligue 1 this season, a record they'll feel confident about maintaini...
